# Pine Valley Investments

> Pine Valley Investments (PVI) is an independent Registered Investment Advisor (RIA) based in Marlton, New Jersey, managing $2.65 billion in assets under management for over 1,800 clients across the U.S. Founded in 2015 by Harry Morad and Joe Duncan, PVI provides fiduciary, client-first financial advice with in-house investment management.

## About PVI

Pine Valley Investments is a fee-only, independent RIA with 40+ financial advisors. The firm offers wealth management, investment advisory services, trust administration & estate planning, qualified retirement plans, investment banking, and networking opportunities. PVI is not affiliated with any broker-dealer and acts solely in a fiduciary capacity for its clients.

- Founded: 2015, Marlton, NJ
- AUM: $2.65 billion (as of 2026)
- Clients: 1,800+
- Advisors: 40+
- Recognition: USA Today Best Financial Advisory Firms 2025

## Services

- Wealth Management
- Investment Advisory Services
- Trust Administration & Estate Planning
- Qualified Retirement Plans
- Investment Banking
- Networking Opportunities

## Leadership

- Harry Morad — CEO & Co-Founder
- Joseph Duncan — COO & Co-Founder
- Mike Modica — CFO & Partner
- Chris O'Neill — CIO, CFA & Partner
- Nick Lampone — CSO & Partner

- PVI Core Advisors

- The Fay Group: Kate Fay, Tom Crossett, Anthony Vasile, Tanya Schneider
